title: Concordia learners win in national art competition
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS  - Two learners from Concordia Primary School, Irah Moos and Hope Trotter, brought national recognition to their school, town, and the Eden Central Karoo District when they were named winners of the prestigious 2025 National Science Week Art Competition.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two learners from Concordia Primary School, Irah Moos and Hope Trotter, brought national recognition to their school, town, and the Eden Central Karoo District when they were named winners of the prestigious 2025 National Science Week Art Competition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The competition was hosted by the UWC Science Learning Centre, which invited learners nationwide to explore the theme "The Unique Role of Water" through visual art."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 2 learner Irah Moos secured first place in the Foundation Phase category with her captivating artwork titled Rooted in nature, growing together.","html":"Grade 2 learner Irah Moos secured first place in the Foundation Phase category with her captivating artwork titled Rooted in nature, growing together."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her piece portrayed the Earth cradled within the branches of a sturdy tree, a powerful symbol of how nature nurtures and safeguards our planet.","html":"Her piece portrayed the Earth cradled within the branches of a sturdy tree, a powerful symbol of how nature nurtures and safeguards our planet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through vivid imagery of water and lush landscapes, Moos highlighted the vital role of natural resources in sustaining life.","html":"Through vivid imagery of water and lush landscapes, Moos highlighted the vital role of natural resources in sustaining life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the Intermediate & Senior Phase category, Grade 5 learner Hope Trotter also took top honours with her striking piece Hands off our ocean.","html":"In the Intermediate & Senior Phase category, Grade 5 learner Hope Trotter also took top honours with her striking piece Hands off our ocean."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her artwork delivered a compelling message about the urgent need to protect marine ecosystems from human impact, using bold visuals to draw attention to environmental responsibility and ocean conservation.","html":"Her artwork delivered a compelling message about the urgent need to protect marine ecosystems from human impact, using bold visuals to draw attention to environmental responsibility and ocean conservation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Although they were unable to attend the Cape Town ceremony in person, the live-streamed event allowed the Concordia community to share in their special moment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both learners are part of the school's extra-curricular art programme, guided by dedicated educators Rienette Joubert and Zanette Terblanche.","html":"Both learners are part of the school's extra-curricular art programme, guided by dedicated educators Rienette Joubert and Zanette Terblanche."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their mentorship was instrumental in shaping the girls' creative journeys."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 2 learner Irah Moos' art piece titled Rooted in nature, growing together.","html":"Grade 2 learner Irah Moos' art piece titled Rooted in nature, growing together."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""Their success is a victory for Concordia, for our community, and for the empower-ment of young women - especially during Women's Month," said Houston Kock, Concordia Primary School representative.","html":""Their success is a victory for Concordia, for our community, and for the empower-ment of young women - especially during Women's Month," said Houston Kock, Concordia Primary School representative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hope Trotter's winning art piece "Hands off our ocean."","html":"Hope Trotter's winning art piece "Hands off our ocean.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KILT also expressed heartfelt congratulations to the learners and their teachers for the inspiring accomplishment. "This achievement is even more special as it coincides with Women's Month, celebrating the creativity, strength, and potential of young learners," said Busisiwe Mningwisa, KILT operations manager.","html":"KILT also expressed heartfelt congratulations to the learners and their teachers for the inspiring accomplishment. "This achievement is even more special as it coincides with Women's Month, celebrating the creativity, strength, and potential of young learners," said Busisiwe Mningwisa, KILT operations manager."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""You have made Concordia Primary proud, and we look forward to witnessing more of your artistic journeys in the future. Well done once again to our talented learners and their dedicated teachers!"","html":""You have made Concordia Primary proud, and we look forward to witnessing more of your artistic journeys in the future. Well done once again to our talented learners and their dedicated teachers!""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Concordia learners win in national art competition | Knysna-Plett Herald","html":"Concordia learners win in national art competition | Knysna-Plett Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
